Data as of Mar 20, 2026. Prices before Sep 21, 2025 are first daily readings scraped from Shell, Caltex and SPC via ChenLim.Com. Other prices are from Motorist.sg.

Wong Pei Ting

Source:

ChenLim.Com, Motorist.sg
